notes:
Loader still doesn't show images, but once the game starts, everything runs perfectly. Even all of my many mods I have for it run perfectly!
Just beat the American campaign fine!
title: Battlezone 98 Redux

notes: Runs like a charm. Nostalgia alert!
title: Battlezone 98 Redux

notes: The game works great with the missions I've played using Proton 4.11-3. I am now longer having the issue related to having Caps Lock on, which caused the radar to switch when pressing any button on the keyboard. Only minor complaint is the BZ98R game launcher box still doesn't display any images, but that is an insignificant issue and does not affect the actual game experience.
title: Battlezone 98 Redux
